title: cytisus supinus var. lasiosemius
intro: Cytisus supinus var. lasiosemius, also known as the glandular broom or broom with glandular leaves, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. The herbal preparations of Cytisus supinus var. lasiosemius typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal remedies.
